backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for a portfolio backend that manages users, blog posts, projects, services, skills, leads, SEO settings, social links, and experiences with role-based access control and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features listed.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of all frontend source files, describing their purpose and notable implementation details or fixes.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the UI.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite/React app that mounts the React root and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main application file that sets up TanStack Router with public and admin nested route layouts, lazy-loads all page components, and wraps the app in QueryClient and ThemeProvider.
frontend/src/components/AdminGuard.tsx: Route guard component that checks Internet Identity authentication and admin status, rendering login or access-denied screens for unauthorized users and the protected content for admins.
frontend/src/components/AdminSidebar.tsx: Admin panel sidebar component that renders navigation links to all admin management sections with active-state highlighting based on the current route.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with navigation links, active social media icons fetched from the backend, a contact call-to-action, and a copyright line.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Wraps page content with a full-height flex layout including Navigation, Footer, and ProfileSetup components.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Button component that handles Internet Identity login and logout, showing loading state and clearing the React Query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky responsive navigation bar with desktop and mobile menus, active-route highlighting, social links, theme toggle, and login button.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Modal dialog that prompts newly authenticated users to enter their name and optional email to create a profile on first login.
frontend/src/components/SEOHead.tsx: Headless component that updates the document title and meta description based on per-page SEO settings fetched from the backend.
frontend/src/components/ThemeToggle.tsx: Icon button that toggles between light and dark themes using next-themes.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP actor, invalidating dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useActorWrapper.ts: Thin wrapper around useActor that exposes a typed call helper ensuring the actor is available before invoking backend functions.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook that manage DFINITY AuthClient lifecycle, persisting identity across reloads and exposing login/logout/status state.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend data operations including CRUD for blog posts, projects, services, skills, testimonials, leads, SEO settings, social links, experiences, and user profile/admin management.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines CSS custom properties for light/dark theme tokens (colors, sidebar, charts) plus utility component classes like glow effects and gradient text.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider, InternetIdentityProvider, and the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: Static About page displaying a developer profile card, stats, bio, values list, and links to contact/projects sections with SEO metadata.
Admin page for managing blog posts with CRUD operations, debounced search, pagination, and a dialog form that auto-generates slugs from titles.
frontend/src/pages/admin/CategoriesManag: Admin page for managing project categories with CRUD operations, debounced search, pagination, and up/down reordering controls.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Dashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard displaying stat cards (projects, blogs, leads, etc.) and navigation cards linking to each admin management section.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ExperienceManag: Admin page for managing work experience entries with CRUD operations, search, pagination, and a form supporting dynamic responsibility list items.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Help.tsx: Admin help page rendering an accordion-based guide covering all admin panel sections such as projects, blog, SEO, and social links.
frontend/src/pages/admin/LeadsManagement: Admin page for viewing and deleting contact leads, with debounced search filtering and client-side pagination across a list of lead cards.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ProjectsManagem: Admin page for full CRUD management of portfolio projects, supporting drag-and-drop reordering, image uploads, category assignment, and active/inactive toggling.
frontend/src/pages/admin/SeoManagement.t: Admin page for creating, editing, and deleting per-page SEO settings (meta title and description), with debounced search and paginated card list.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ServicesManagem: Admin page for managing services with add, edit, and delete operations via a dialog form, debounced search, and paginated card display.
frontend/src/pages/admin/SkillsManagemen: Admin page for managing skills with category classification, experience values, paginated search results, and create/edit/delete dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/admin/SocialLinksMana: Admin page for managing social media links (GitHub, LinkedIn, X) with CRUD operations, search/pagination, toggle active state, and a dialog form for adding/editing links.
frontend/src/pages/admin/TestimonialsMan: Admin page for managing testimonials with debounced search, pagination, and a dialog form for creating/editing testimonial entries (author and message fields).
frontend/src/pages/Blog.tsx: Blog listing page that fetches and displays all blog posts as cards with title, description, and date, with loading skeletons and navigation to individual post pages.
frontend/src/pages/BlogPost.tsx: Individual blog post page that looks up a post by slug from the fetched posts list and renders its HTML content with SEO metadata and a back navigation button.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Contact page with a lead submission form (name, email, message) and info cards for email, location, and response time, using toast notifications for success/error feedback.
frontend/src/pages/Experience.tsx: Displays a timeline of professional work experiences fetched via `useGetExperiences`, showing job title, company, period, description, and responsibilities. Renders skeleton cards while loading.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Landing page featuring a hero section, tech stack showcase, FAQ accordion, and social links fetched via `useGetSocialLinks`, with scroll-triggered animations throughout.
frontend/src/pages/NotFound.tsx: Simple 404 error page with a large '404' display, a message, and buttons to navigate home or go back.
frontend/src/pages/Projects.tsx: Portfolio projects page that fetches projects and categories, supports category filtering, and displays project cards in a responsive grid with skeleton loading states.
frontend/src/pages/Services.tsx: Services page that fetches and displays professional services in a grid, with a live search input to filter by title or description.
frontend/src/pages/Skills.tsx: Skills page that groups fetched skills by category and renders each with a progress bar representing years of experience, ordered by a predefined category sequence.
frontend/src/pages/Testimonials.tsx: Testimonials page that fetches and displays client/colleague feedback in a card grid, each showing a 5-star rating, quoted message, and author name.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and a function to remove parameters from the URL hash without reloading.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom fonts (Inter, Space Grotesk, JetBrains Mono), extended color palette using OKLCH values (cyan, navy, semantic tokens), border radius variables, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata (version 11) tracking existing features and fix requests, primarily documenting the goal of reverting frontend and backend files to their Version 12 state by undoing changes from versions 13–16.
